title: Unexpected behaviour of for loop and if statement

features.name: for loop with dead if-else and nonblocking assignment
features.description: Code should include a for loop where the loop body is solely an if-else statement with if(0) in the condition branch and a non-blocking assignment in the else branch
features.snippet: for (reg_count = 0; reg_count < 2; reg_count = reg_count + 1'h1) if (0); else reg_assign <= 1;

features.name: for loop iterating reg variable with nonblocking in always block
features.description: Code should include an always @(posedge clk) block containing a for loop that iterates a reg variable and contains a non-blocking assignment inside an if-else
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) if (sel) for (reg_count = 0; reg_count < 2; reg_count = reg_count + 1'h1) if (0); else reg_assign <= 1; else reg_assign <= 0;
